name: Apache Arthas
description: Java diagnostic tool by Alibaba for real-time troubleshooting in production without restart.

seo.title: Apache Arthas — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Apache Arthas: Java diagnostic tool by Alibaba for real-time troubleshooting in production without restart.

when_to_use: Real-time JVM diagnostic without restarting in production
Trace method calls and inspect parameters on live JVMs
Detect memory leaks and thread deadlocks in-flight
Hot-patch classes in running Java applications

pros: Attach to running JVM without restart
Trace method calls and inspect stack in production
Free, open source, backed by Alibaba
cons: Java-only, no support for other JVM languages nuances
Command-line interface has steep learning curve
Risky if misused on production without guardrails
review.verdict: Indispensable JVM diagnostic swiss-army-knife for production debugging when APMs fall short.
review.best_for: Java SREs debugging live production issues without adding instrumentation.
review.not_for: Teams on non-Java stacks or wanting GUI-driven profiling.
